# captainscor.ch

> Personal portfolio of Daniel Schmier (captainscorch): Design Engineer specializing in full-stack development, product design, and modern web technologies.

Use the pages below for structured context about projects, articles, and contact paths.

## Site

- [Home](https://scorchos.test/): Landing and overview.
- [About](https://scorchos.test/about): About me / CV.
- [Portfolio](https://scorchos.test/portfolio): Selected case studies and personal projects.
- [Blog](https://scorchos.test/blog): Articles and insights on design, development and beyond.
- [Playground](https://scorchos.test/playground): Experiments and interactive demos.

## Case studies

- **Gastroenterologie Kassel** — [Medical Practice Website with Minimalist Branding](https://scorchos.test/case-study/gastroenterologie-kassel)
- **way.food** — [Foodtruck & Catering Comparison Portal](https://scorchos.test/case-study/way.food)
- **cale design** — [Minimalist Shopify Store for Premium Furniture & home accessories](https://scorchos.test/case-study/cale)
- **Portfolio Website** — [My Personal Website, Portfolio with Case Studies, Blog & Playground](https://scorchos.test/case-study/captainscor.ch)
- **ICEMÄNNER** — [High-energy B2B & B2C Ecommerce Experience](https://scorchos.test/case-study/icemaenner)
- **Loz** — [DTC Shopify Store for Oral Care Startup](https://scorchos.test/case-study/loz)
- **lyftd.app** — [Smart Training, Stronger You — Full-Stack Workout Tracking Platform](https://scorchos.test/case-study/lyftd)
- **Personal Gallery** — [Gallery of my favorite photos from around the world](https://scorchos.test/case-study/photography)
- **Tamplen Plastic Surgery** — [Premium Multi-Location Plastic Surgery Website](https://scorchos.test/case-study/tamplen)

## Blog

Each post is also available as Markdown at the same path with a `.md` suffix (`?lang=` / `Accept-Language` supported).

- [Beyond Prompts: Architecting with AI](https://scorchos.test/blog/journal/beyond-prompts-architecting-with-ai) · [Markdown](https://scorchos.test/blog/journal/beyond-prompts-architecting-with-ai.md)
- [Mastering Concentric Border Radius](https://scorchos.test/blog/craft/concentric-border-radius) · [Markdown](https://scorchos.test/blog/craft/concentric-border-radius.md)
- [Enhanced Security for Laravel Forge nginx Configurations](https://scorchos.test/blog/craft/laravel-forge-nginx-security) · [Markdown](https://scorchos.test/blog/craft/laravel-forge-nginx-security.md)
